title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
problem_statement: Return the maximum depth of a binary tree.
constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 10^4]
intuition: Use recursion or BFS to compute the depth of the tree from root to farthest leaf.

approaches.name: Recursive depth-first search
approaches.description: Return 1 plus the maximum depth of the left and right subtrees.
approaches.why_not: An iterative BFS is also valid but recursion is straightforward.

interview_qa.q: What is the base case for recursion?

interview_qa.a: The number of nodes along the longest path from the root to a leaf.
